hero.title: Build Your Future in Canada
hero.subtitle: Canada is a top destination for immigrants, known for its strong economy, excellent quality of life, and welcoming multicultural communities. With a range of immigration pathways, newcomers can access career opportunities, quality healthcare, education, and a clear path to permanent residency and citizenship.

visas.title: Immigration Pathways
visas.subtitle: Choose the immigration pathway that fits your goals.

study.title: Study Permit
study.description: Study at Canadian colleges and universities while gaining valuable international experience.

work.title: Work Permit
work.description: Build your career through employer-sponsored or skilled worker programs.

startup.title: Start Up Visa
startup.description: For entrepreneurs with innovative projects and ideas.

express.title: Express Entry
express.description: Immigration program for skilled and qualified workers.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Jounery to Canada?
cta.subtitle: Book a consultation with our imigration specialists and receive personalized guidance for your Canadian imigration journey.

hero.title: Build Your Future in Australia
hero.subtitle: Australia is a leading destination for skilled professionals, students, and families seeking new opportunities. With a strong economy, excellent healthcare and education, and a high standard of living, Australia offers multiple immigration pathways and a clear route to permanent residency for eligible applicants.

visas.title: Immigration Pathways
visas.subtitle: Choose the immigration pathway that fits your goals.

study.title: Student Visa
study.description: Study at Australian colleges and universities while gaining valuable international experience.

work.title: Skilled Independent Visa
work.description: For workers whose occupations are in high demand.

work2.title: Skills in Demand
work2.description: Employer sponsorship for skilled workers to fill localized labor shortages.

work3.title: Work and Holiday Visa
work3.description: Immigration program for young adults, ages 18 to 30, to live in Australia for 12 months while working.

partner.title: Partner Visa
partner.description: For spouses and de facto partners of Australian citizens, permanent residents, or eligible New Zealand citizens.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Jounery to Australia?
cta.subtitle: Book a consultation with our imigration specialists and receive personalized guidance for your Australian imigration journey.

hero.title: Build Your Future in France
hero.subtitle: France offers an exceptional quality of life, a strong social system, and access to opportunities across Europe. Whether you're relocating for work, study, business, or family, France provides multiple immigration pathways along with world-class healthcare, excellent education, and a route to long-term residency and citizenship.
benefits: Access to the European job market
Pathways to long-term residency and citizenship

visas.title: Immigration Pathways
visas.subtitle: Choose the immigration pathway that fits your goals.

study.title: Student Visa
study.description: Study at French colleges and universities while gaining valuable international experience.
features: Free travel across the Schengen Area

work2.title: Talent Passport
work2.description: For highly qualified professionals, intra-company transfers, and investors.

work3.title: Entrepreneur Visa
work3.description: Ideal for freelancers and solo business owners.

family.title: Family Reunification Visa
family.description: For spouse and children of legal residents in France.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Jounery to France?
cta.subtitle: Book a consultation with our imigration specialists and receive personalized guidance for your French imigration journey.

hero.title: Build Your Future in Germany
hero.subtitle: Germany is Europe's largest economy, offering excellent career opportunities, a high standard of living, and a strong social system. Whether you're relocating for work, study, or family, Germany provides multiple immigration pathways, world-class healthcare, and a clear route to long-term residency.
benefits: Access to world-class healthcare and education
Pathways to long-term residency and citizenship

visas.title: Immigration Pathways
visas.subtitle: Choose the immigration pathway that fits your goals.

study.title: Student Visa
study.description: Study at German colleges and universities while gaining valuable international experience.

work.title: Au Pair Visa
work.description: For young adults between 18 to 27 seeking a cultural exchange.

work2.title: Freelancer Visa
work2.description: For qualified professionals to live and work independently in Germany.

work3.title: Job Seeker Visa
work3.description: Allows skilled professionals to enter the country and look for work for up to 6 months.

work4.title: Business Investor/Entrepreneur Visa
work4.description: For entrepreneurs seeking to establish a new business, expand and existing enterprise, or participate in a regional development project that benefits the German economy.

family.title: Family Reunion Visa
family.description: For spouse and children of legal residents in Germany.
features: Access to the public education system

hero.title: Build Your Future in Ireland
hero.subtitle: Ireland is a dynamic destination for professionals, students, and families, offering a thriving economy, a high quality of life, and a welcoming English-speaking environment. With strong career opportunities, excellent healthcare and education, and pathways to long-term residency, Ireland is an ideal place to build your future.
benefits: Access to high-quality healthcare and education
Pathways to long-term residency and citizenship

visas.title: Immigration Pathways
visas.subtitle: Choose the immigration pathway that fits your goals.

study2.title: Higher Education Program
study2.description: Study at Irish colleges and universities while gaining valuable international experience.

work.title: General Employment Permit
work.description: Covers a broad range of occupations.

work2.title: Critical Skills Employment Permit
features: Automatic work rights for eligible dependents

family.title: Join Family Visa
family.description: For spouse and children of eligible residents.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Jounery to Ireland?

hero.title: Build Your Future in Italy
hero.subtitle: Italy offers a unique combination of rich cultural heritage, excellent quality of life, and access to opportunities across the European Union. Whether you're relocating for work, study, family, or investment, Italy provides multiple immigration pathways, quality healthcare, and options for long-term residency.
benefits: Access to the European job market
Pathways to long-term residency and citizenship

visas.title: Immigration Pathways
visas.subtitle: Choose the immigration pathway that fits your goals.

study.title: Student Visa
study.description: Study at Italian colleges and universities while gaining valuable international experience.

work.title: Subordinate Work Visa
work.description: For individuals moving to Italy under a formal employment contract.

work2.title: Self-Employment Visa
work2.description: Designed for entrepreneurs, freelancers, and independent contractors looking to establish a business or practice in Italy.

work3.title: Digital Nomad Visa
work3.description: Designed for remote workers and freelancers who want to live in Italy while working entirely for clients or employers based abroad.

investor.title: Golden Visa
investor.description: Flexible residency program designed for investors.

residence.title: Elective Residence Visa
residence.description: For financially independent individuals to live in Italy permanently.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Jounery to Italy?
cta.subtitle: Book a consultation with our imigration specialists and receive personalized guidance for your Italian imigration journey.
